final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: needs a "国风" refined editorial aesthetic with ink-and-dye craft sensibility — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand style guide layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in clearly labeled sections
Subject: must include the full brand identity system:
  Primary colors: autumn-warm palette inspired by 桂花 (osmanthus), 柿子 (persimmon), 枫叶 (maple), 乌龙茶 (oolong)
  Secondary/accent colors: drawn from 肉桂 (cinnamon), 檀香 (sandalwood), 琥珀 (amber)
  Typography specimens: brand name in Chinese and romanized form, plus specimen text referencing core series names
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined flat-lay or editorial spread backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must be warm autumn-earth dominant — deep persimmon oranges, osmanthus golds, amber browns, muted maple reds, sandalwood beiges; exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle paper or silk dye texture evoking traditional "染" (dyeing) craft — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", "染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭"
Constraints: must preserve all three sections — 主色 (primary colors), 辅色 (secondary colors), 字体规范 (typography specimens) — each clearly delineated with color swatches and labels
Avoid: must avoid Western minimalist cold-tone palettes, neon or synthetic colors, generic sans-serif tech aesthetics
